creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
I am not able to use 965G Intel graphics with i915 kernel module, error
messages from kernel are in "How to repeat the problem".

This is Asus P5B-VM board with Intel 965G chipset with GMA x3000 onboard
graphics from Intel.



pciconv -lv returns:
vgapci0@pci0:0:2:0:	class=0x030000 card=0x81ea1043 chip=0x29a28086 rev=0x02 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Intel Corporation'
    device     = 'G965 Integrated Graphics Controller'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA



x11 startup errors after loaded i915 module
(xorg is properly configured with "intel" driver):

% xinit


X.Org X Server 1.4.0
Release Date: 5 September 2007
X Protocol Version 11, Revision 0
Build Operating System: FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT i386
Current Operating System: FreeBSD  8.0-CURRENT-200806 FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT-200806
 #0: Wed Jun  4 01:39:24 UTC 2008     root@almeida.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/
src/sys/GENERIC i386
Build Date: 09 June 2008  09:09:31AM

        Before reporting problems, check http://wiki.x.org
        to make sure that you have the latest version.
Module Loader present
Markers: (--) probed, (**) from config file, (==) default setting,
        (++) from command line, (!!) notice, (II) informational,
        (WW) warning, (EE) error, (NI) not implemented, (??) unknown.
(==) Log file: "/var/log/Xorg.0.log", Time: Wed Jun 18 23:17:37 2008
(==) Using config file: "/etc/X11/xorg.conf"
(II) Module "ddc" already built-in
(II) Module "i2c" already built-in
(II) Module "ramdac" already built-in
(EE) GARTInit: Unable to open /dev/agpgart (No such file or directory)
(EE) [drm] drmOpen failed.
(EE) intel(0): [dri] DRIScreenInit failed. Disabling DRI.
(EE) intel(0): Failed to allocate framebuffer. Is your VideoRAM set too low?
(EE) intel(0): Couldn't allocate video memory

Fatal server error:
AddScreen/ScreenInit failed for driver 0

XIO:  fatal IO error 53 (Software caused connection abort) on X server ":0.0"
      after 0 requests (0 known processed) with 0 events remaining.

Fix: Propably some patch to i915 kernel module.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: (boot + login as root)
# kldload i915
lock order reversal:
 1st 0xc58ac9c4 ufs (ufs) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_subr.c:2044
 2nd 0xc0c5353c kernel linker (kernel linker) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/kern_linker.c:
693
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper(c0b30b24,e79746c8,c07c1f3e,c0b33391,c0c5353c,...) at db_tr
ace_self_wrapper+0x26
kdb_backtrace(c0b33391,c0c5353c,c0b2a988,c0b2a988,c0b2a9cc,...) at kdb_backtrace
+0x29
witness_checkorder(c0c5353c,9,c0b2a9cc,2b5,e7974718,...) at witness_checkorder+0
x6de
_sx_xlock(c0c5353c,0,c0b2a9cc,2b5,c0b2a9cc,...) at _sx_xlock+0x7d
linker_file_lookup_set(c5888c00,c0b2aa1e,e7974734,e7974730,0,...) at linker_file
_lookup_set+0x4a
linker_file_register_sysctls(c0c5353c,c0b2a9cc,19d,17c,0,...) at linker_file_reg
ister_sysctls+0x2d
linker_load_module(c58b2d50,0,e7974940,e797493c,e7974938,...) at linker_load_mod
ule+0x92f
linker_load_dependencies(c5888b00,0,c58b2ba0,2a4,4ba0,...) at linker_load_depend
encies+0x194
link_elf_load_file(c0bf0360,c57c4320,e7974c24,17c,0,...) at link_elf_load_file+0
x4d7
linker_load_module(0,e7974c4c,c0b2a9cc,3cd,bfbfed80,...) at linker_load_module+0
x8cb
kern_kldload(c56fe460,c52d7000,e7974c70,0,280c3974,...) at kern_kldload+0xc8
kldload(c56fe460,e7974cfc,4,c56fe460,c0be91e0,...) at kldload+0x74
syscall(e7974d38) at syscall+0x2a3
Xint0x80_syscall() at Xint0x80_syscall+0x20
--- syscall (304, FreeBSD ELF32, kldload), eip = 0x280c397b, esp = 0xbfbfed0c, e
bp = 0xbfbfed38 ---
agp0: <Intel G965 SVGA controller> on vgapci0
device_attach: agp0 attach returned 19
drm0: <Intel i965G> on vgapci0
error: [drm:pid751:drm_load] *ERROR* Card isn't AGP, or couldn't initialize AGP.

device_attach: drm0 attach returned 12
# kldstat
Id Refs Address    Size     Name
 1   35 0xc0400000 9feca8   kernel (/boot/kernel/kernel)
 2    1 0xc0dff000 6d7c8    acpi.ko (/boot/kernel/acpi.ko)
 3    1 0xc566c000 24000    linux.ko (/boot/kernel/linux.ko)
 4    1 0xc58ad000 6000     i915.ko (/boot/kernel/i915.ko)
 5    1 0xc58b3000 f000     drm.ko (/boot/kernel/drm.ko)
# kldunload i915
# kldload i915
agp0: <Intel G965 SVGA controller> on vgapci0
device_attach: agp0 attach returned 19
drm0: <Intel i965G> on vgapci0
error: [drm:pid759:drm_load] *ERROR* Card isn't AGP, or couldn't initialize AGP.

device_attach: drm0 attach returned 12
